creator: utisoft@gmail.com
text:
Of course, as I look again at the Tinderbox output I notice:

>> Installing files in /usr/local/share/MailScanner... [DONE]
>> Installing files in /usr/local/lib...>> Installing docs and manpage... [DONE]
                                               ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^

It's always the trivial things that get missed isn't it....

New patch at [1] -- the only difference is an extra @${ECHO_MSG} "
[DONE]" in the right place.

Chris

[1] http://www.bayofrum.net/~crees/patches/mailscanner-4.83.5.patch
